prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科/物理类最低位次约 20111→27636→21220→32470→27996，整体波动较大，2024 年出现明显后移（32470 名），2025 年回升至约 27996 名，近 3 年累计后移约 6800 名；2025 年基准约 27996 名；该校在四川省理科/物理类计划 2021–2022 年均为 79 人，2023 年 83 人，2024 年 82 人，2025 年 83 人；2026 年计划 94 人，较 2025 年扩招 11 人（+13.25%），扩招幅度较大，按供需关系将推高录取位次（竞争加剧）。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜约第 83 名（2026 年），近年排名稳定在 80–85 名区间，属全国中上游水平；2026 年声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及师德师风事件（校内通报被质疑），可能轻微影响部分考生报考意愿；抖音热度排名第 51 位（较热），有一定短视频曝光；2024 年曾出现陕西文科投档异常信号，对理科影响有限；风景园林学 A+（全国顶尖），与该校农林特色高度一致，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力；其余学科未获 A 类评级。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业社会热度持续偏热/高热推荐，与北林理科招生专业（计算机类、电气工程、自动化等） 高度重合，可能吸引更多高分考生报考；四川省 2026 年物理类考生约 32.9 万人（按历史比例估算），较 2025 年增加约 4.4 万人（+15.5%），竞争显著加剧；北京林业大学位于北京，对西南省份考生有一定地域吸引力；该校在四川招生人数占比较小（ 约 80–90 人），属外省招生规模中等水平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 27996 名、2026 年大幅扩招 13.25%、物理类考生增加约 15.5% 以及计算机/电气等热门专业持续高热等多重因素，扩招与考生增加形成双向竞争压力，预计 2026 年录取位次较 2025 年继续后移；预测最低位次约 30423 名，区间 29923–30923 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Science/Physics Category was approximately 20111→27636→21220→32470→27996, showing significant fluctuations. In 2024, there was a notable backward shift (32470th), and in 2025 it rebounded to about 27996th, with a cumulative backward shift of about 6800 positions over the past 3 years. The 2025 baseline is approximately 27996th. The university's enrollment plan for Science/Physics Category in Sichuan Province was 79 students in both 2021 and 2022, 83 in 2023, 82 in 2024, and 83 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 94 students, an increase of 11 students (+13.25%) compared to 2025, which is a relatively large expansion. According to supply and demand, this will push up the admission ranking (increased competition).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 83rd on the Soft Science main list (2026), with stable rankings in the 80–85 range in recent years, placing it at the upper-middle level nationally. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly due to incidents involving teacher ethics (internal notifications questioned), which may slightly affect some candidates' willingness to apply. Douyin popularity ranking is 51st (relatively hot), with some short video exposure. In 2024, there was an abnormal signal in the liberal arts admission in Shaanxi, but the impact on science is limited. Landscape Architecture is rated A+ (top nationally), highly consistent with the university's forestry characteristics, and has strong appeal for related majors. No other disciplines received an A rating.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be popular/highly recommended, which highly overlap with BFU's science enrollment majors (Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, Automation, etc.), potentially attracting more high-scoring candidates. In 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Sichuan Province is approximately 329,000 (estimated based on historical proportions), an increase of about 44,000 (+15.5%) compared to 2025, significantly intensifying competition. Beijing Forestry University is located in Beijing, which has some regional appeal for candidates from southwestern provinces. The university's enrollment in Sichuan is relatively small (about 80–90 students), which is a moderate scale for out-of-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 27996th, a significant enrollment expansion of 13.25% in 2026, an increase of about 15.5% in Physics Category examinees, and the continued high popularity of hot majors like Computer Science and Electrical Engineering, the expansion and increase in examinees create two-way competitive pressure. It is expected that the admission ranking in 2026 will continue to shift backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 30423rd, with a range of 29923–30923rd.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is approximately 30423rd, with a range of 29923–30923rd. It is recommended that candidates with rankings within 30000th focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice and aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch. Candidates with rankings after 31000th should prioritize Tier 3 majors as safety options. Tier 1 majors such as Computer Science and Electrical Engineering are highly competitive, requiring rankings significantly better than the lower bound of the predicted range (within about 29000th) to seriously aim for. Landscape Architecture (including the Liangxi Experimental Class), as BFU's flagship major (A+), has high ranking requirements but strong professional barriers, suitable for candidates with a clear interest in agriculture, forestry, and landscape.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category was approximately 8221→4076→3828→4379→3772. In 2021, the ranking was relatively high (8221st), and from 2022 onward, it moved significantly forward to around 4000th and remained relatively stable, with a fluctuation range of 3772–4379 in the past three years. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 3772nd. The university's enrollment plan in Sichuan for liberal arts/history category was 13 students in both 2021 and 2022, 11 in 2023, 10 in 2024, and 11 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 13 students, an increase of 2 students (+18.2%) compared to 2025, which is a relatively large expansion. According to supply and demand, this will push the admission ranking higher (increased competition).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking approximately 83rd (2026), stable in recent years. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is somewhat negative, mainly involving teacher ethics incidents, which may slightly affect some candidates' willingness to apply. Douyin popularity ranking 51st (relatively hot), with some exposure. In 2024, there was an anomaly in Shaanxi liberal arts admissions (a sharp drop from 2000th to 10000th), but Sichuan liberal arts rankings have been stable in recent years without such a gap. Landscape Architecture is A+ (top in the country), but the liberal arts/history category enrollment majors (Law, Business Administration, Business English, Applied Psychology, etc.) have low correlation with this advantageous discipline.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has a relatively hot social popularity/recommended; Chinese Language/Literature recommended; Teacher Training/Education is divided and wait-and-see; Foreign Languages generally wait-and-see. BFU's liberal arts enrollment majors are mainly Business Administration, Law, and Foreign Languages, with overall moderate popularity. In 2026, Sichuan Province has approximately 206,000 history category candidates (estimated based on historical proportion), an increase of about 28,000 (+15.7%) compared to 2025, intensifying competition. Beijing Forestry University is located in Beijing, which has some regional appeal for liberal arts candidates from southwestern provinces. The university's liberal arts enrollment in Sichuan is small (about 10–13 students), belonging to small-scale enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 3772nd, the 2026 enrollment expansion of 18.2%, the increase in history category candidates of about 15.7%, and the moderately high popularity of liberal arts majors, the expansion rate is slightly larger than the candidate growth rate, but the ranking base is small (about 4000th), so small fluctuations can have a significant impact. It is expected that the 2026 admission ranking will be slightly lower than in 2025, with a predicted minimum ranking of approximately 4134th, and a range of 3634–4634th.
